name: Mozzarella Pasta Penne
recipeIngredient: 14 ounces canned whole plum tomatoes, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in boiling water until just tender.
2. Meanwhile, heat the tomatoes and oil in a pan, breaking down the tomatoes gently with a wooden spoon.
3. Add the mozzarella, half the parmesan, basil, and seasoning to taste. Bring to a boil and remove from heat.
4. Drain the pasta and place it in an ovenproof dish.
5. Pour the sauce over the pasta and mix well. Sprinkle with remaining parmesan.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 10 minutes until the cheese is golden.
